description: A poster on a dark navy background. The top half is a photograph of President Trump in a dark blue suit and red tie walking through a steel mill (rolled steel coils at right, a large American flag hanging in the background) beside three workers in orange hi-vis coveralls and white hard hats; Trump gestures with one hand. Overlaid in the center is a two-line headline in white serif type: a smaller italic 'The Golden Age of the' above large bold all-caps 'SKILLED TRADES!'. The bottom third is a collage of three torn-paper headline clippings with station logos: WBOC CBS ('Trade Schools Rising In Popularity'), 2 NEWS NEVADA ('Trade school demand has increased since the pandemic'), and DENVER 7 ABC ('Colorado trade schools see increased enrollment as students prioritize cheaper pathways to jobs'). The palette is blue with white serif typography.
notable_text: The Golden Age of the SKILLED TRADES!; Trade Schools Rising In Popularity (WBOC CBS); Trade school demand has increased since the pandemic (2 News Nevada); Colorado trade schools see increased enrollment as students prioritize cheaper pathways to jobs (Denver 7 ABC)
